name: ClickHouse Analytics DB
description: Column-oriented OLAP database for real-time analytics over billions of rows. Blazing-fast aggregations, a SQL interface and a built-in web Play console. A local powerhouse for dashboards, logs and event analytics.

variables.label: HTTP / Play Port
variables.description: Host port for the HTTP interface and the web Play console.

variables.label: Native TCP Port
variables.description: Host port for the native protocol used by clickhouse-client and drivers.

variables.label: Username
variables.description: Database user created on first boot.

variables.label: Default Database
variables.description: Name of the database created on first boot.
